ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF RAILWAY EMPLOYEES' CREDIT UNION

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $102.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $67.28 FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAILWAY EMPLOYEES' CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT FLEMING, BEN AKA BEN FLEMMING
